    A

    AbandonedShip - Class in Model.Board.AdventureCards
    Represents an abandoned ship adventure card in the game.
    AbandonedShip(int, CardLevel, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.AbandonedShip
     
    AbandonedShip(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.AbandonedShip
     
    AbandonedShipCrewRemovalState - Class in Controller.AbandonedShip
    Represents the state where players can remove crew members from their ship after encountering an abandoned ship during the flight phase.
    AbandonedShipCrewRemovalState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.AbandonedShip.AbandonedShipCrewRemovalState
    Constructs the state with the given context.
    AbandonedShipDecidingState - Class in Controller.AbandonedShip
    Represents the state where players decide whether to accept or skip the reward from encountering an abandoned ship during the flight phase.
    AbandonedShipDecidingState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.AbandonedShip.AbandonedShipDecidingState
    Constructs the state with the given context.
    AbandonedStation - Class in Model.Board.AdventureCards
    Represents an abandoned station adventure card in the game.
    AbandonedStation(int, CardLevel, int, List<Good>, int) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.AbandonedStation
     
    AbandonedStation(JsonObject) - Constructor for class Model.Board.AdventureCards.AbandonedStation
     
    AbandonedStationDecidingState - Class in Controller.AbandonedStation
    Represents the state in which players decide whether to accept or skip the reward from encountering an abandoned station during the flight phase.
    AbandonedStationDecidingState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.AbandonedStation.AbandonedStationDecidingState
    Constructs the state with the given context.
    AbandonedStationLandState - Class in Controller.AbandonedStation
    Represents the state in which a player manages the goods obtained from an abandoned station.
    AbandonedStationLandState(Context) - Constructor for class Controller.AbandonedStation.AbandonedStationLandState
    Constructs the state with the given context.
